patient_worklist.create_sql:
CREATE TABLE "patient_worklist" (
    "id" TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
    "name" TEXT NOT NULL,
    "gender" TEXT NOT NULL,
    "age" INTEGER,
    "checkType" TEXT NOT NULL,
    "status" TEXT NOT NULL,
    "hasImage" BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
    "admissionDate" DATETIME,
    "region" TEXT,
    "examType" TEXT,
    "createdAt" DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    "updatedAt" DATETIME NOT NULL
)

protocol.create_sql:
CREATE TABLE "protocol" (
    "id" TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
    "name" TEXT NOT NULL,
    "region" TEXT NOT NULL,
    "scanLocationLabel" TEXT NOT NULL,
    "supportedPositions" JSONB NOT NULL,
    "supportedModes" JSONB NOT NULL,
    "ageGroup" TEXT,
    "weightRangeKg" TEXT,
    "doseCtdiVol" REAL,
    "doseDlp" REAL,
    "notifyCtdiVol" REAL,
    "notifyDlp" REAL,
    "advancedMARef" REAL,
    "advancedAF" REAL,
    "source" TEXT NOT NULL,
    "enabled" BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
    "updatedAtMs" BIGINT NOT NULL,
    "createdAt" DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    "updatedAt" DATETIME NOT NULL
)

protocol_queue.create_sql:
CREATE TABLE "protocol_queue" (
    "id" TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
    "protocolId" TEXT NOT NULL,
    "queueId" TEXT NOT NULL,
    "name" TEXT NOT NULL,
    "sequenceType" TEXT NOT NULL,
    "type" TEXT,
    "mode" TEXT NOT NULL,
    "params" JSONB NOT NULL,
    "sortOrder" INTEGER NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT "protocol_queue_protocolId_fkey" FOREIGN KEY ("protocolId") REFERENCES "protocol" ("id") ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE
)

protocol_recon_task.create_sql:
CREATE TABLE "protocol_recon_task" (
    "id" TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
    "protocolId" TEXT NOT NULL,
    "protocolQueueId" TEXT NOT NULL,
    "taskId" TEXT NOT NULL,
    "name" TEXT NOT NULL,
    "params" JSONB NOT NULL,
    "sortOrder" INTEGER NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT "protocol_recon_task_protocolId_fkey" FOREIGN KEY ("protocolId") REFERENCES "protocol" ("id") ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,
    CONSTRAINT "protocol_recon_task_protocolQueueId_fkey" FOREIGN KEY ("protocolQueueId") REFERENCES "protocol_queue" ("id") ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE
)
